parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of distortion applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Push Diode: Selects the type of clipping diode for the first socket. The original pedal's circuit included sockets so the user could swap out diodes to customize their sound.
parameters-en.Pull Diode: Selects the type of clipping diode for the second socket. The original pedal's circuit included sockets so the user could swap out diodes to customize their sound.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ of the distortion.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ of the distortion.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Asymm: Adjusts the amount of clipping symmetry. Lower values are more symmetrical; higher values are more asymmetrical, or more "broken." More audible when running into a clean amp.
